## Feature Design

# Feature Design

No visual surface.


## Target Model

The builder will use the `opus` model.

## Phase Budget

Stay below ~50,000 output tokens (~$12 USD) per phase — treat it as a hard maximum, not a target. Aim for 50–70% of the ceiling. If a phase would approach or exceed it, split. Splitting is cheap; a too-large phase risks timeout and truncation.

### 01-foo.md

Do it.


## Output Format

Respond with ONLY a JSON object matching the schema in your system prompt. No prose, no markdown fences, no commentary.
